title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Code Llama, and other large language models locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, generate completions, and pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chat, embeddings, and tool-calling pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) for chatting with local models; supports RAG, multi-user, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support; available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and embedding endpoints; published on crates.io.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with chat history, syntax highlighting, and model management helpers.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server using Ollama backends.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app example that streams responses from a local Ollama server.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Starter template for building RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and LangChain vector stores.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that sends selected code or prompts to Ollama and inserts responses inline.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command for chatting with local models in any channel.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you summarize notes, generate flashcards, or ask questions via Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a remote tool for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot built with python-telegram-bot that chats with any Ollama model and supports group topics.
